article.title: China pushes for 70% homegrown silicon wafer use as domestic firm ramps up 12-inch production — government seeking to localize critical chip supply chain amid AI boom and export restrictions
article.summary: China is targeting 70% local wafer sourcing as firms like Eswin scale 12-inch production, aiming to reduce reliance on foreign suppliers and support growing AI chip demand.
article.title_zh: 中國推動70%國產矽晶圓使用率，國內廠商加速12英吋產能——政府尋求在AI熱潮和出口限制下本土化關鍵芯片供應鏈
article.summary_zh: 中國瞄準70%本地晶圓採購目標，Eswin等公司加速12英吋產能提升，旨在減少對外國供應商依賴並滿足AI芯片需求增長。

article.title: EBay Investor Skeptical That GameStop Can Make Good on Acquisition Offer
article.summary: Bill Smead says he’s not sure where GameStop will find the money
article.title_zh: eBay 投資者懷疑 GameStop 是否能兌現收購要約
article.summary_zh: Bill Smead 表示他不確定 GameStop 將從何處籌措資金。

article.title: FCC to ban smartphone testing in Chinese labs, manufacturers might face regulatory hurdles
article.summary: The FCC came out with a decision to ban all testing of electronic devices meant for the US market in Chinese labs. For instance, a device destined for the US market has to pass certain FCC certifications that ensure things like radio emissions and network compatibility are in check. Much of this is done in Chinese labs at the respective manufacturers' R&D centers, and according to the FCC, about 75% of all US devices rely on the testing results from Chinese labs. However as the US has deemed China a security threat for some time now, so this move might not come as a surprise for some....
article.title_zh: FCC 禁止在中國實驗室進行智能手機測試，製造商可能面臨監管障礙
article.summary_zh: FCC 決定禁止在中國實驗室測試供美國市場的電子設備，製造商必須通過特定的 FCC 認證。

article.title: Sonos Seeks $40 Million in Tariff Refunds and Revenue Jumps 8%
article.summary: Sonos Inc. shares climbed after reporting revenue that jumped 8% and said that it is filing for tariff refunds totaling $40 million that could help counterbalance rising memory costs.
article.title_zh: Sonos尋求4000萬美元關稅退款，收入增長8%
article.summary_zh: Sonos Inc.股票上漲，報告收入增長8%，並表示正在申請4000萬美元的關稅退款以抵消上升的記憶成本。

article.title: “Real maturity problems”: Not every developer is thrilled with Bun after Anthropic acquisition
article.summary: Growing and emerging software toolsets and standards are prone to love-it-or-hate-it reactions. Bun , an all-in-one JavaScript, TypeScript & JSX runtime and toolkit, has divided a few taste buds among developers. Apparently named after the bao variant rather than the burger variety , Bun v0.1.0 arrived in July of 2022 and was designed to act as a drop-in replacement for Node.js , the widely popular cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment. Anthropic acquisition Created by Jarred Sumner , Anthropic acquired Bun in December 2025 to accelerate Claude Code capabilities and act as a combined runtime, package manager, bundler, and test runner. Anthropic has called Bun “essential infrastructure for AI-led software engineering.” It also defines it as a tool that helps develope
article.title_zh: 「真正的成熟度問題」：並非每位開發人員都對 Anthropic 收購後的 Bun 感到滿意
article.summary_zh: Bun 是一個一體化的 JavaScript、TypeScript 和 JSX 執行時和工具包，在開發人員之間引發了兩極分化的反應。

article.title: Why China Blocked Meta’s $2 billion Acquisition of Manus AI
article.summary: Beijing blocked Meta’s $2 billion Manus deal. On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, we discuss what the fallout means for Chinese AI startups with global ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 中國為何阻止Meta 20億美元收購Manus AI
article.summary_zh: 北京阻止了Meta的20億美元Manus交易，Big Take Asia播客討論此舉對全球野心的中國AI新創公司意味著什麼。

article.title: Huawei braces for $12 billion in AI chip revenue driven by homegrown AI model demand — Chinese fabs can barely keep up as Nvidia's market share craters within the region
article.summary: The projection, based on orders already received from major Chinese technology firms including Alibaba, ByteDance, and Tencent, would represent growth of at least 60% year-over-year.
article.title_zh: 華為為自主AI模型需求驅動的120億美元AI芯片營收做準備——中國晶圓廠產能緊張，Nvidia市場份額在該地區大幅下滑
article.summary_zh: 基於來自阿里巴巴、字節跳動和騰訊等主要中國科技公司的訂單預估，該數字將代表至少60%的年成長率。

article.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
article.summary: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
article.title_zh: CopilotKit 融資 2700 萬美元幫助開發者部署應用原生 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: 這家西雅圖新創公司的 A 輪融資由 Glilot Capital、NFX 和 SignalFire 領投，據 TechCrunch 獨家報導。

article.title: Modernize your workflows: Amazon WorkSpaces now gives AI agents their own desktop (preview)
article.summary: Enterprises face a significant challenge when deploying AI agents: the desktop and legacy applications that power most business workflows are simply inaccessible to modern AI systems. According to a 2024 Gartner report , 75% of organizations run legacy applications that lack modern APIs, and 71% of Fortune 500 companies operate critical processes on mainframe systems without adequate programmatic access. For many organizations, this has meant choosing between delaying AI adoption or undertaking expensive and risky modernization projects. Today, we are announcing that Amazon WorkSpaces now enables AI agents to securely operate desktop applications without requiring application modernization. The same managed virtual desktops that millions of employees use and trust can now also serve AI age
article.title_zh: 現代化您的工作流程：Amazon WorkSpaces 現已為 AI 代理提供專屬桌面（預覽版）
article.summary_zh: 企業在部署 AI 代理時面臨重大挑戰：驅動大多數業務工作流程的桌面和舊版應用程式對現代 AI 系統來說根本無法存取。根據 2024 年 Gartner 報告，75% 的組織運行缺乏現代 API 的舊版應用程式。

article.title: Google, Microsoft, and xAI agree to let US government test AI models before public release — OpenAI and Anthropic also on board after renegotiating deals with Washington
article.summary: OpenAI and Anthropic, which had existing evaluation partnerships with the center dating to 2024, renegotiated their deals to align with priorities in Trump's AI Action Plan.
article.title_zh: Google、Microsoft和xAI同意讓美國政府在公開發布前測試AI模型——OpenAI和Anthropic在與華盛頓重新談判協議後加入
article.summary_zh: OpenAI和Anthropic重新談判了與評估中心的協議，以符合Trump AI Action Plan的優先事項。

article.title: Anthropic Unveils AI Agents to Field Financial Services Tasks
article.summary: Anthropic PBC unveiled a set of new artificial intelligence agents designed to handle a broader mix of financial services tasks, part of the company’s push to win over Wall Street.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 推出 AI 代理處理金融服務任務
article.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC 推出一套新的人工智慧代理，旨在處理更廣泛的金融服務任務，是該公司贏得華爾街青睞的努力之一。

article.title: OpenAI releases a separate ChatGPT iOS app for enterprise users
article.summary: OpenAI now has a new iOS app on the App Store, although it’s not quite Codex related . Instead, it’s a separate version of ChatGPT for iPhone and iPad created specifically for school and work organizations. more…
article.title_zh: OpenAI 為企業使用者推出獨立的 ChatGPT iOS 應用
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 App Store 上推出了新的 iOS 應用，這是為學校和工作機構特別打造的 ChatGPT iPhone 和 iPad 專用版本。

article.title: Nvidia Billionaire Mark Stevens Gives $200 Million to Alma Mater USC for AI Research
article.summary: Billionaire Nvidia Corp. director Mark Stevens and his wife Mary are gifting $200 million to the University of Southern California to advance AI research and education across the school.
article.title_zh: Nvidia億萬富翁Mark Stevens捐贈2億美元給母校USC進行AI研究
article.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp.董事、億萬富翁Mark Stevens及其妻子Mary向南加州大學捐贈2億美元，以推進AI研究和教育。

article.title: Steam Controller scalpers are asking for $300+ on eBay — Valve's $99 controller demands high price as pre-orders sell out almost immediately
article.summary: Valve's long-anticipated Steam Controller sold out almost immediately, and scalpers have stepped in with price demands of $300 or more.
article.title_zh: Steam Controller 黃牛在 eBay 要價 300 美元以上——Valve 99 美元控制器預訂幾乎秒售罄
article.summary_zh: Valve 期待已久的 Steam Controller 幾乎立即售罄，黃牛隨之介入並要價 300 美元以上。

article.title: AMD Ryzen AI 5 435G APU breaks cover in early benchmarks — six-core Zen 5 chip goes head-to-head with the Ryzen 5 8600G for budget PC builders
article.summary: The Ryzen AI 5 435G shows similar performance to the existing Ryzen 5 8600G in new Geekbench 6 benchmarks.
article.title_zh: AMD Ryzen AI 5 435G APU 提前曝光基準測試——六核 Zen 5 晶片與 Ryzen 5 8600G 對標預算 PC 製造商
article.summary_zh: Ryzen AI 5 435G 在新的 Geekbench 6 基準測試中展現出與現有 Ryzen 5 8600G 相似的效能。

article.title: JSR to build first Taiwan photoresist plant to co-develop advanced resists with TSMC — multi-million dollar plant could come online as early as 2028
article.summary: The facility will close a gap that has put JSR at a disadvantage relative to its two largest Japanese rivals.
article.title_zh: JSR將在台灣建設首家光刻膠工廠與TSMC共同開發先進光刻膠——數百萬美元工廠最早可在2028年投入運營
article.summary_zh: 該工廠將彌補JSR相對於日本兩大競爭對手的劣勢。
